calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Of Petitioner For Order Compelling Arbitration; For Appointment Of A Neutral Arbitration And For Award Of Costs
Off Calendar Dec-11-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
John A. Kithas, Esq., 788-8100, for petitioner MARITZA PEREZ, moving for Order Compelling Arbitration; For Appointment Of A Neutral Arbitration And For Award Of Costs
Annemarie Molitor, Esq. and Paul Ellis Baron, Esq. of LEWIS BRISBOIS 438-6692, for respondents Linda Servis and Keller Williams, opposing the motion

Ruling:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- PETITIONER MARITZA PEREZ'S Motion For Order Compelling Arbitration; For Appointment Of A Neutral Arbitration And For Award Of Costs -- Denied as to Motion to compel arbirtation; contract requires mediation first. Denied as to award of costs. Order signed in open court. (302/PHA/BH) JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, CSR: ROBERT BALIAN, CSR #5220
